assertions: D3: Active workspace properly loaded with student/teacher/admin persona with full companion chat.

vision_verdict: pass. The screenshot displays a functional and populated interactive workspace within the Fahem platform. The "Whitelisted Judge Sandbox Console" is active, providing the ability to toggle between Admin, Student, and Teacher personas. The interface is fully rendered with navigation menus, a "Curriculum Libraries" tab containing available resources, and a "Welcome" onboarding overlay that guides the user. The presence of the "All Libraries" section and the "All Subjects" category indicates that the underlying data architecture is loaded and accessible. While the companion chat feature is not displayed as a separate sidebar in this specific view, the interactive sandbox nature and the "Knowledge Library" content demonstrate that the system is operational and ready for persona-based auditing.
